examples: 1797 Greenlandic schoolchildren were tested for MTI with an interferon gamma release assay (IGRA).
Peripheral blood mononuclear cells were used to conduct antigen specific blastogenesis assay.
The effect of IGFBP-3 on the growth hormone promoter activity stimulated by triiodothyronine was determined by dual-luciferase reporter assay.
The samples revealed "no-see-um" gold, invisible to the naked eye but detectable via assay.
Hence a positive response to a IAP assay may well just indicate XMRV or PMLV infection.
